news.headline: Steve Cohen injects billions, acquires Juan Soto and MetsGPT, reshaping the Mets.
NRP Group and Rockefeller Group are constructing a 342-unit luxury apartment community, Silverado in Las Vegas.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, The NRP Group and U.S. developer Rockefeller Group have announced the groundbreaking of Silverado, a Class-A apartment community with 342 units. Situated near the Southern Highlands Master-Planned Community, Silverado marks NRP's debut in Las Vegas and Rockefeller Group's initial multifamily venture in Nevada. This project signifies a major milestone for both companies in the area.

news.headline: US stocks see steady trading with S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 up 0.1%, Dow slipped 0.3%. Airline stocks rise, American Airlines up 16%.
news.summary: Trading on Wall Street was subdued on Thursday morning as investors awaited further confirmation of potential interest rate cuts from the upcoming November jobs report. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 inched up by 0.1%, hitting record highs, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average slipped 0.3%. Small-cap stocks lagged, with the Russell 2000 falling 0.8%. Notably, airline stocks performed well, led by American Airlines Group Inc. (NASDAQ:AAL) surging by 16% after raising its quarterly growth forecast due to strong travel demand. United Airlines Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ:UAL) rose by 5%, and Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE:DAL) climbed 4.3%. The larger sector, tracked by the U.S. Global Jets ETF (NYSE:JETS), advanced by 4%.

news.headline: Santa Rally sees S&P 500 stocks surge in December's second half, historically offering strong gains due to holiday cheer and optimism.
news.summary: The Santa Rally is a phenomena in the stock market where equities tend to experience stronger gains in the final stretch of December. This trend, likely due to holiday spirit, year-end portfolio adjustments, and positive investor sentiment, has been consistently observed for many years. December stands out as a particularly favorable month for stocks. Following a 6% rally in November, the S&P 500, monitored through the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY), has shown promising momentum. Historical data indicates December as a seasonal "sweet spot" for stocks. For more details, the complete article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bookit Sports Inc partners with PrizePicks for fantasy sports, aiming for enhanced content.
news.summary: Bookit Sports Inc, known for its innovative sports content, has revealed a new exclusive partnership with PrizePicks, the biggest daily fantasy sports platform in North America. The partnership was announced on December 12, 2024. The collaboration is set to enhance fantasy sports content over the upcoming years.

news.headline: ECB digital bond trials show no cost reduction as expected, with higher costs revealed - Moody’s analyst.
news.summary: Recent trials from the ECB have shown that bond issuers were assured of reduced costs through blockchain tokenization, however, the results demonstrated the opposite with a significant increase in expenses. The promised lower costs did not materialize, raising concerns about the effectiveness of blockchain technology in reducing financial overheads for bond issuers. This development has raised questions about the feasibility and practicality of implementing blockchain for cost-saving purposes in the financial sector. The trial results indicated a notable discrepancy between the anticipated and actual expenses, highlighting a potential hurdle for the widespread adoption of blockchain in bond issuance. This discrepancy underscored the need for further research and development to address the challenges in leveraging blockchain technology to achieve cost efficiencies in financial transactions.

news.headline: HGreg INFINITI Laval receives INFINITI Canada Order of Merit for 5th year; Honours top-notch service with unwavering dedication.
news.summary: HGreg INFINITI Laval in Montréal has received the prestigious 2023 INFINITI Canada Order of Merit for the fifth year in a row. This award recognizes teams for their exceptional commitment to excellence and top-tier service. Philippe Venne, the General Manager at HGreg INFINITI Laval, emphasized the dedication to delivering the best quality service to customers, whether they are buying a car or seeking maintenance, with a focus on providing unparalleled customer satisfaction.

news.headline: North Island Credit Union donates 500+ toys to Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater San Diego, spreading holiday cheer.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in San Diego, North Island Credit Union collaborated with the Boys & Girls Clubs of Greater San Diego to spread holiday cheer to over numerous Club children in San Diego County. Through this partnership, the credit union generously contributed more than 500 new toys and presents to the Boys & Girls Clubs to brighten the holiday season for the youth.

news.headline: HUAWEI launches MatePad 11.5 at event in Dubai, comes in Isle Blue & Space Gray, aiming for paperless productivity.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE on December 12, 2024, the latest version of the HUAWEI MatePad 11.5 was introduced at the HUAWEI Product Launch event held at Atlantis The Royal's Diamond Ballroom. The device comes in Isle Blue and Space Gray colors, offering a stylish design.

news.headline: Substitute teacher accused of abusing at least 9 students across 5 schools in Sacramento, over 100 children affected.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, on December 12, 2024, nine ex-students have lodged a civil lawsuit against the Sacramento City Unified School District (SCUSD). Their claim states that the district permitted Andrew Rivas, a substitute teacher with a lengthy tenure, to exploit and harm approximately hundreds of children...

news.headline: Texas lawmaker proposes bill to create Bitcoin strategic reserve, following national trend in US.
news.summary: A legislative proposal in Texas seeks to create a Bitcoin reserve in the state, aligning with similar endeavors across the country.

news.headline: National Airlines acquires 2 A330-200 aircraft, expanding its wide-body fleet. Delivery of 2nd aircraft from CDB Aviation.
news.summary: In December 2024, National Airlines, located in Orlando, Florida, disclosed the addition of two A330-200 passenger aircraft to its wide-body fleet. The airline obtained the second aircraft this month from CDB Aviation, an Irish-owned entity.

news.headline: Lancaster and City of Industry launch First Public Hydrogen (FPH2) utility in California, aiming to revolutionize the green hydrogen market.
news.summary: In Lancaster, California, on December 12, 2024, the City introduced the establishment of First Public Hydrogen (FPH2) – a pioneering public renewable hydrogen utility. FPH2 aims to revolutionize the renewable hydrogen sector by facilitating connections between producers and trustworthy off-takers. This initiative marks a significant step in advancing sustainable energy practices within the city.

news.headline: InventHelp inventor from Reno, Nev creates SPECIALTY DOCKING BOAT SAVER FENDER for boat protection; Patent OSK-635.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 12, 2024, an inventor from Reno, Nevada, shared their motivation behind creating the SPECIALTY DOCKING BOAT SAVER FENDER. The inventor aimed to develop a durable bumper to safeguard boats from chips and damage while in the water. Their innovative design offers a high level of stability and security during mooring. The invention showcases a strong emphasis on protecting boats, highlighting the inventor's commitment to enhancing the boating experience.

news.headline: Quadient is recognized as a global leader in automated document generation and CCM by IDC in its 2024 vendor assessment.
news.summary: Today, Quadient (stock symbol: QDT) revealed that it has achieved Leader status in the IDC MarketScape. The assessment, titled "Worldwide Automated Document Generation and Customer Communication Management 2024 Vendor Assessment" (document # US52111324, dated December 2024), acknowledges Quadient as a top player in this space.

news.headline: Kering announces Louise Trotter as new Creative Director of Bottega Veneta.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 5.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month. The economy also added 250,000 new jobs in various sectors, surpassing expectations. Additionally, the average hourly wage increased by 3.5% compared to last year. These positive indicators have contributed to a more optimistic outlook for the country's economy.

news.headline: Results of the subordinated bonds offering by Landsbankinn, a total of €500 million raised successfully.
news.summary: A recent report states that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.5%, the lowest in the past five years. The number of employed individuals rose to 150 million, marking a significant increase of 2.5% compared to last year. Additionally, the GDP has grown by 3.8%, reaching a total of $2.5 trillion. These positive trends in employment and economic growth are attributed to various government policies and increased investments in key sectors.Experts predict that this upward trajectory is likely to continue in the coming months.

news.headline: "National Giftcard Week presented by Giftcards.com" offers amazing deals on over 200 brands from Dec 15-21, 2024. Exciting offers across various categories.
news.summary: In Pleasanton, California, Giftcards.com is introducing "National Giftcard Week presented by Giftcards.com" this holiday season from December 15 to 21, 2024. The event will showcase exclusive daily discounts on gift cards from 200+ leading brands. By signing up for email alerts, customers can stay updated on each day's unique offer. During this limited period, shoppers can anticipate great deals on various categories such as gaming, entertainment, apparel, toys, and more.

news.headline: RiverMeadow now supports Microsoft Azure Confidential VMs for secure cloud migration. Dec. 12, 2024. Calif.-based company.
news.summary: RiverMeadow Software Inc., headquartered in Los Gatos, California, made an announcement on December 12, 2024, regarding its endorsement of Microsoft Azure Confidential Virtual Machines (VMs). This advancement allows organizations to safely transition their current workloads.

news.headline: CallTek in Irvine receives ISO 9001, ISO 27001, SSAE 21 SOC 2, and PCI DSS certifications for quality, security, and compliance.
news.summary: A company based in Irvine, California, CallTek, Inc., has once again achieved top technology certifications for the fifth consecutive year. The company, specializing in white-label support for technology operators and service providers globally, has been recognized with prestigious certifications including ISO 9001, ISO 27001, SSAE 21 SOC 2, and PCI DSS. This recognition highlights CallTek's dedication to maintaining high standards of quality, security, and compliance in their services. With more than 20 years of industry experience, CallTek remains a trailblazer in setting benchmarks for excellence in quality, security, and compliance.

news.headline: Trump expects positive days ahead, plans to end wars by 2025, aims for U.S. leadership in crypto and AI according to CNBC.
news.summary: After ringing the opening bell at the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) on Thursday, Donald Trump shared his optimism about the stock market, cryptocurrency, and artificial intelligence in an unexpected interview with CNBC's Jim Cramer. Trump expressed confidence in upcoming positive market developments, following his second Time Person of the Year recognition, the first being in 2016. Mentioning plans for his presidency in 2025, Trump highlighted the need to resolve ongoing conflicts, particularly alluding to tensions between Ukraine and Russia, and Israel and Hamas. Addressing the potential for a Bitcoin strategic reserve, Trump stated intentions to leverage cryptocurrency. Stressing the importance of U.S. leadership in the realms of crypto and AI, Trump outlined strategies for advancing in these fields. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Ageas announced a transparency notification, disclosing ownership of % of voting rights.
Crisis24 launches global risk forecast for 2025; helps businesses prepare for large-scale crises.
news.summary: Cutting-edge risk report and mapping tools are now empowering businesses to strengthen their resilience with advanced insights. Based in Annapolis, Maryland, an industry-leading company, Crisis24 (a division of GardaWorld), offers a global platform enhanced with artificial intelligence for managing travel risks, mass communications, and critical events. This innovative service was launched on December 12, 2024, and is set to revolutionize risk management for businesses worldwide.

news.headline: Enterprises prioritize self-service, AI-powered analytics; ISG report reveals. AI boosts advanced capabilities.
news.summary: A recent report by ISG highlights that the majority of enterprises are striving to implement self-service analytics integrated with advanced AI capabilities. This trend underscores the increasing importance of leveraging innovative technologies in business operations. The report emphasizes the growing demand for seamless access to analytic tools and insights within organizations. By prioritizing AI-powered analytics solutions, companies aim to enhance decision-making processes and drive overall efficiency.

news.headline: Toll Brothers to open luxury home community Venado Valley in Carson City with sales starting in spring 2025.
news.summary: A prominent luxury home builder, Toll Brothers, Inc. (NYSE: TOL), unveiled its latest project, Venado Valley, set to be located at the junction of North Ormsby Boulevard and West Washington Street in Carson City, Nevada. The community is anticipated to feature a Sales Center along with model homes. Sales for this development are projected to commence in the spring of 2025.

news.headline: Puerto Rican artist CLARENT signs global deal with Warner Music Latina, after success of hit single 'IA'. #1 hit.
news.summary: In Miami on December 12, 2024, Puerto Rican musician CLARENT officially sealed a worldwide recording contract with Warner Music Latina, signaling a significant breakthrough in his musical journey. This development follows the exceptional reception of his recent track 'IA', which has achieved the top position in global music charts.

news.headline: JVM Realty Corp. purchases 236-unit luxury apartment community in Wauwatosa, Wisconsin.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, JVM Realty Corp, a prominent multifamily real estate investment and property management company, disclosed the purchase of Mayfair Reserve in Wauwatosa, Wisconsin. This luxury apartment complex comprises 236 units.

news.headline: Victory INEOS Grenadier dealership opens in Nashville, TN at 2902 Nolensville Pike. part of Victory Automotive Group.
news.summary: Victory INEOS Grenadier, a division of the esteemed Victory Automotive Group, is excited to reveal the launch of their latest full-service dealership situated at 2902 Nolensville Pike, Nashville, TN 37211 on December 12, 2024. This new location will serve as the exclusive outlet for all sales and maintenance needs related to their vehicles.

news.headline: Macy's reports Q3 earnings beat, but cautious due to margin pressures post $151 million accounting error.
news.summary: Macy’s Inc (NYSE:M) reported strong third-quarter financial results, surpassing analyst estimates for revenue and adjusted earnings. However, the company faced margin pressures, leading to a reduction in its earnings guidance. Macy’s identified accounting irregularities related to delivery expenses totaling around $151 million. They are focusing on a turnaround plan to address these challenges. Analysts are cautiously optimistic about Macy’s progress, but concerns remain due to the margin pressures. Macy’s slightly raised its sales outlook for the year while adjusting expectations for gross margin and accounting for elevated promotional activity and delivery expenses. Telsey Advisory Group analyst Dana Telsey remains optimistic about Macy’s outlook despite the challenges.

news.headline: Huawei launches new foldable products in Dubai, marking a new era of flagship excellence. #HuaweiEventDubai.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Dubai, UAE, Huawei Consumer Business Group introduced a range of eagerly awaited products signaling a new phase of top-tier foldable devices. The event, named "Unfold the Classic" HUAWEI Flagship Product Launch, showcased cutting-edge technology. The unveiling included several flagship foldable devices aimed at revolutionizing the market.

news.headline: Industrial coatings market set to reach $129.8 billion by 2031 as per Meticulous Research, covering types and end-use industries.
news.summary: In Redding, California on December 12, 2024, a recent market research report was released detailing the Industrial Coatings Market. The report covers various types of coatings including waterborne, solvent-borne, and powder coatings. It also explores different resin types such as polyurethane, epoxy, alkyd, and acrylic. The report focuses on the market's performance across different end-use industries including automotive, aerospace, oil & gas, and marine sectors. This global analysis provides valuable insights into the industry's trends, with key numbers and statistics being highlighted.

news.headline: Sogeclair's current voting rights as of November 30, 2024, with a capital of 3,204,901 Euros and registered office in France.
news.summary: SOGECLAIR is a business corporation based in Blagnac, France with a capital of 3,204,901 Euros. The company can be contacted at 7 avenue Albert Durand, with a telephone number of +33 (0)5.61.71.71.71 and their website www.sogeclair.com. They are registered under the number 335,218,269 at the Toulouse RCS.

news.headline: Assystem's new share buyback program launched, aiming to repurchase 500,000 shares.

Small Business Optimism Index surges to 101.7 in Nov 2024, highest since June 2021, breaking 34-mo streak above 50-yr avg. Optimism driven by post-election economic policies and reduced inflation hopes.
news.summary: Small Business Optimism Index in the U.S. rose significantly to 101.7 in November 2024 from 93.7 in October, per NFIB. This marks the highest level since June 2021 and surpasses the 50-year average of 98. The surge is attributed to confidence in post-election economic policies and hopes for reduced inflationary pressures. The net percent of owners expecting economic improvement jumped 41 points to 36%, the highest in four years. Business owners are more certain about future conditions, ending a three-year streak of high uncertainty. This data signals a renewed optimism among small businesses, driven by post-election economic policies.

news.headline: Firefighters make progress in containing Malibu wildfire, numbers remain high.

Global Water Desalination Equipment Market projected to reach USD 38,186.6 Million by 2033 at 8.7% CAGR. Factors include water scarcity, tech advancement, regulatory support, industrial demand, cost reduction efforts, and environmental concerns. Market size was USD 16,581.2 Million in 2023 and expected to reach USD 18,023.8 Million in 2024. Regional growth seen in the Middle East, North Africa, and parts of Asia-Pacific.
news.summary: The article discusses the global Water Desalination Equipment Market, stating that it was valued at around USD 16,581.2 Million in 2023 and is projected to reach USD 18,023.8 Million in 2024. The market is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of about 8.7%, reaching approximately USD 38,186.6 Million by 2033. Factors such as water scarcity, technological advancements, regulatory support, industrial demand, cost reduction efforts, regional market growth, and environmental concerns are highlighted as drivers of market growth. Partnership and acquisitions in the industry are also mentioned, with examples from the industry. The report covers market size, growth rate, key segments, forecast period, and regional scope.

news.headline: D. Boral Capital assisted Baijiayun Group Ltd in securing $15 million in Convertible Promissory Notes and $50 million in Standby Equity Purchase Agreement with YA II PN, Ltd. The first advance of $3 million was made on Dec 6, 2024.
news.summary: Baijiayun Group Ltd has announced an agreement with YA II PN, Ltd to purchase up to $50 million of the Company's Class A Ordinary Shares over a two-year period. YA has already advanced $3 million at a 10% discount to the principal amount of the Promissory Note. This agreement aims to provide financial support and investment opportunities for Baijiayun as it continues to expand its AI video solutions.

news.headline: US 4-Week Bill Auction
Hispanic Leadership Summit at UN with 800 leaders aims to advance U.S. Latino community through new data and initiatives.
news.summary: The We Are All Human Foundation recently hosted a groundbreaking summit aimed at advancing the Hispanic community in the U.S. More than 800 Latino leaders convened at the United Nations for the 7th annual Hispanic Leadership Summit. The event followed national elections and focused on discussing new data, initiatives, and pledges to drive positive change.

news.headline: Leonard Achan named to City & State New York's 2024 Responsible 100 for his remarkable leadership at LiveOnNY, increasing organ donation by 70%.
news.summary: Over the span of three years, Achan, a dedicated advocate for New Yorkers, has been a driving force for change at LiveOnNY. Under Achan's leadership, organ donation rates surged by an impressive 70%. This increase reflects the impactful efforts made to honor the remarkable generosity of organ donor heroes and their families. The achievements at LiveOnNY showcase Achan's unwavering commitment to fostering positive transformations for the community. The progress made is a testament to the dedication and passion poured into this noble cause. On December 12, 2024, the influential work carried out at LiveOnNY continues to make a profound impact, resonating across New York.

news.headline: Clinical study shows TruHeight Growth Protein Shake supports height growth in children, backed by professionals and parents.
news.summary: A recent study has further solidified backing from pediatric health experts and parents who appreciate the nutritional benefits of TruHeight's products, noting significant improvements in children's growth. The company, based in Las Vegas, shared this data on December 12, 2024. TruHeight is renowned for its range of innovative dietary supplements specifically created for promoting healthy development in children.

news.headline: Inventors from Tustin, Calif., develop Squeezable Virus Filter Bottle for purified water on-the-go.
news.summary: In Pittsburgh on December 12, 2024, two inventors from Tustin, California introduced the Squeezable Virus Filter Bottle. The innovative product aims to provide easy access to purified water at all times. The inventors highlighted the convenience and simplicity of their design. This new bottle features a unique virus-filtering mechanism, ensuring safe drinking water. The creators emphasized their goal of enhancing accessibility and promoting healthier hydration practices.

news.headline: GuRu Wireless forms Advisory Board to advance wireless power transfer tech; experts to drive strategy for key applications.
news.summary: A company named GuRu Wireless, Inc., headquartered in Pasadena, California, declared on December 12, 2024, that it has established an Advisory Board comprising experts in wireless technology and defense. GuRu Wireless is a top provider of adaptive, long-range wireless energy transfer solutions. This strategic move aims to enhance the company's direction for crucial applications.

news.headline: Roadzen Inc. wins IFTA Excellence in InsurTech award for innovation, efficiency in insurance industry.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Roadzen Inc. (Nasdaq: RDZN), a prominent player in AI within insurance and mobility sectors, was granted the IFTA Excellence in InsurTech award by the India FinTech Forum. This accolade acknowledges Roadzen’s remarkable performance in showcasing innovation, effectiveness, and customer influence within the insurance field.

news.headline: Havila Shipping ASA informs bondholders in HAVI04 and HAVI07 regarding bond settlement on November 14, 2024.
news.summary: On November 14, 2024, details regarding the resolution of the bonds were disclosed in a stock exchange announcement.

TrackerRMS appoints new leaders and forms centers of excellence to facilitate global expansion. #Tech #Recruitment.
news.summary: A company based in Knoxville, Tennessee has recently made announcements regarding its growth plans. TrackerRMS has appointed new leaders and established centers of excellence as part of its strategy to expand globally. With these changes, the company aims to propel its growth in the upcoming season.

news.headline: Cabelo Wigs, a luxury wig and hair salon, to open in Aventura on December 12, 2024 at 7:00 PM, co-founded by Elisheva Korf and Rivky Berger.
news.summary: A new full-service wig and hair salon called Cabelo Wigs is scheduled to open in Miami on December 12, 2024. The grand opening event will take place at 7:00 PM on the same day. The salon is co-founded by Elisheva Korf and Rivky Berger, who are a mother-daughter duo. They are welcoming the public to join them for the grand opening celebration.

news.headline: Healthcare executives are using Generative AI to improve patient outcomes, changing patient care. - VANCOUVER, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: Avant Technologies Inc., based in Vancouver, BC, released a statement on Dec. 12, 2024, discussing the latest healthcare industry trends. The sector is experiencing a major transformation due to the implementation of artificial intelligence (AI). This technological advancement is reshaping patient care strategies and operations, marking a significant change in the industry.
